creator: dbn@FreeBSD.org
text:
Exact same problem:
# pkg info amarok | head -n1
amarok-2.8.0_11
# uname -r
11.0-RELEASE-p8
# amarok -d |& grep SSL_connect
amarok:         [WARNING] [PluginManager] "Failed to get factory 'amarok_collection-mysqlecollection' from KPluginLoader: Cannot load library /usr/local/lib/kde4/amarok_collection-mysqlecollection.so: (/usr/local/lib/kde4/amarok_collection-mysqlecollection.so: Undefined symbol "SSL_connect")"
